inputs.label: Heartbeats Counted

businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm süresi boyunca sayılan nabız atım sayısı.

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the person for reference comparison.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the person for reference comparison.

inputs.label: Fitness Level
inputs.businessContext: Self-assessed fitness level from 1 (sedentary) to 10 (elite athlete). Used for interpretation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Self-assessed fitness level from 1 (sedentary) to 10 (elite athlete). Used for interpretation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 (hareketsiz) ile 10 (elit atlet) arasında kendini değerlendirilen fitness seviyesi. Yorumlama için kullanılır.

formulas.breakdown2Text: 'Normal resting heart rate ranges from 60 to 100 bpm for adults. Athletes may have 40-60 bpm.'

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
